Herald H436

Add needs-data-classification tag and comment
ActivePublic
Actions

  • Edit Rule
  • Disable Rule
  • Mute Notifications
  • Flag For Later
Referenced Files
None
Subscribers
None

Details

Rule Type
Global
Applies To
Differential Revisions

Description

When all of these conditions are met:

Repository is any of rMOZILLACENTRAL mozilla-central, rFIREFOXAUTOLAND firefox-autoland
Project tags include none of needs-data-classification, data-classification-high, data-classification-low, data-classification-unnecessary
Affected files matches regexp @.*/.*metrics.*.yaml|.*/pings.yaml|toolkit/components/telemetry/Histograms.json|toolkit/components/telemetry/Scalars.yaml|toolkit/components/telemetry/Events.yaml|toolkit/components/telemetry/app/TelemetryEnvironment.sys.mjs|dom/base/UseCounters.conf|toolkit/crashreporter/CrashAnnotations.yaml@
Revision status is not any of Closed, Abandoned, Draft, Changes Planned

Take these actions every time this rule matches:

Add projects: needs-data-classification.
Add comment: This revision changes [how Firefox collects data](https://wiki.mozilla.org/Data_Collection), so it needs a #data-classification tag.
